top_issues: Stub login must expose a single obvious primary path into the app shell without implying real OAuth security.
Activity feed should tolerate empty fixture states and surface fetch failures with retry aligned to Neubrutalism banners.
Task Creation (Dark) must not leak dark tokens into the three light routes—scope theme to /tasks/new subtree only.
summary.risk_statement: If hierarchy between marketing-style hero blocks and operational controls is unclear, users may miss the todo CRUD path on Dashboard or confuse stub login with production-ready auth.

findings.title: Dashboard: operational todo workspace competes with editorial hero density
findings.evidence: Stitch Dashboard stacks large typographic blocks and KPI-like chips above the task workspace; H1 scale may rival section labels for the todo list region in implementation.
findings.impact: Users may scan past the create/list affordances and perceive the page as marketing-only.
findings.recommendation: Keep a single dominant H1 for the workspace and demote decorative metrics to secondary weight per design_system label role.

findings.title: Social Login: provider grid rhythm must stay on the 8px/neubrutal grid
findings.evidence: Exports use thick strokes and tight clusters of provider tiles; inconsistent vertical gaps will read as misaligned rather than intentional brutalism.
findings.impact: Mis-taps on dense mobile breakpoints if spacing drifts from the export rhythm.
findings.recommendation: Lock vertical spacing between provider rows to token steps and preserve minimum 44px hit targets even when borders are 2px.

findings.title: Stub auth cannot mirror OAuth security copy
findings.evidence: Screen title reads Social Login; MVP is stub-only per architecture brief.
findings.impact: Users may assume real federation and session hardening.
findings.recommendation: Add explicit stub copy and a single Continue control that sets a non-sensitive cookie/session flag documented for QA.

findings.title: Activity feed depends on fixture handler—empty and error states are mandatory
findings.evidence: Feed layout assumes a vertical timeline; fixture may be empty during early QA seeds.
findings.impact: Blank screens without explanation read as broken rather than intentionally empty.
findings.recommendation: Implement empty state copy and retry for non-OK responses from /api/activity-feed per ui_spec.

findings.title: Task Creation (Dark): accent orange must retain contrast on dark surfaces
findings.evidence: Dark surfaces in export pair with high-contrast strokes; orange accent sits on near-black fields.
findings.impact: WCAG failures on focused inputs or primary CTA if orange is used for small text on dark bg.
findings.recommendation: Reserve accent for strokes, focus rings, and large button labels; pair with light ink for microcopy on dark.

findings.title: Cross-route navigation should remain visible in the authenticated shell
findings.evidence: Four routes are peer surfaces; users will jump between dashboard, feed, and composer during demos.
findings.impact: Hidden navigation increases back-button reliance and breaks the stitched IA.
findings.recommendation: Provide a persistent AppShell nav with clear current-route indication using label typography role.
